description: The status of an application for legal aid funding

applicationReference.description: The human readable reference to the application supplied by legal aid agency

statusId.description: Reference data identifer for the agreed status

statusCode.description: The status code from reference data

statusDescription.description: The status description from reference data

statusDate.description: The date that the status was recorded

effectiveStartDate.description: The start date for legal aid, set when the status represents an approved representation order

effectiveEndDate.description: The end date for legal aid, set when the status represents an approved representation order
